name: Layered Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fresh spinach, cleaned and torn apart
1 head iceberg lettuce, cleaned and torn apart
1 package Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and tear apart 1/2 pound of fresh spinach.
2. Clean and tear apart 1 head of iceberg lettuce.
3. Add 1 package of frozen peas to the salad.
4. Slice 4 hard boiled eggs.
5. Crumble 1/2 pound of cooked bacon.
6. Layer the ingredients in a serving dish, following the order above.
7. Mix together 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing mix, 1 cup sour cream, and 2 cups mayonnaise to make the dressing.
8. Spread the dressing over the top of the salad.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
This salad is especially good when made several hours or a day ahead.
